title: Short Grass
description: Fabric mod that will make grass shorter and less obstructive
body:
This is a really small fabric mod which will only do one thing, and that is to replace your grass and tall texture **and block shape** with shorter ones. This way it'll be easier to hit those stupid chicken that always try to hide in the grass. It will also help the game to look cleaner. There will still be that small detail, but not as obstructive.

This mod is required/usable client side only
